rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are defined
generic_rules: Use visible component ports in type-level contracts to define output dependencies
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared with valid names: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed within annex agree { ... } blocks
Guarantee statements should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Constants and equations in AGREE use int, real, and bool as scalar types
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not place implementation-specific bindings in component type scopes
